sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using this platform, you agree to these Terms and Conditions and all applicable laws and regulations.

sections.title: Use of Service
sections.content: You agree to use the service lawfully and not engage in fraudulent, abusive, or disruptive behavior.

sections.title: User Responsibilities
sections.content: Users are responsible for maintaining account confidentiality, accurate information, and authorized account activity.

sections.title: Payments and Refunds
sections.content: Payments must be completed through approved methods. Refund eligibility depends on order status and return policy.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the company is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
